title: cyclosorus menisciicarpos
intro: Cyclosorus menisciicarpos, also known as the Meniscus fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to various parts of the world, including Asia and the Pacific Islands, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The leaves and rhizomes of the Meniscus fern have been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus menisciicarpos can be made by drying the leaves and rhizomes, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea, or by combining them with other herbs in a poultice or salve to apply topically.
